goal: Split root-only residual work out of the Mermaid 11.15 complete-adaptation campaign and make the full parity-root gate produce bounded, auditable failure summaries.
handoff: DONE. Fresh full root evidence reports 309 unaccepted residuals after existing accepted root policy entries are applied.

goal: Classify the Sequence root residual bucket and split source-derived lifecycle/frame/text rules from browser/root lattice tails.
validation: cargo run -p xtask -- compare-sequence-svgs --filter central_connection --check-dom --dom-mode parity-root --dom-decimals 3 --report-root-all
handoff: DONE. Sequence compare supports --no-root-overrides, renderer options now disable Sequence root pins, and 3 stale 11.12 root pins were deleted. Fresh report has 168 raw Sequence root mismatches, 167 unaccepted after zed_pr_57644_sequence.

goal: Classify the remaining Flowchart root residual bucket after the 11.15 shape-source slices.
handoff: DONE. Flowchart root residuals are classified as small root/text-measurement tails: 61 mismatches remain, all bounded under about 2.24px root-width drift except no larger source-rule bucket. One stale root pin was deleted; disabling all Flowchart root pins increases mismatches to 96.

goal: Classify Architecture, Class, and C4 root residuals into source-rule, root-pin, and diagnostic browser-root buckets.
handoff: DONE. C4 root residuals are closed by refreshing 15 existing fixture-derived root pins to Mermaid 11.15 upstream values. Architecture remains 32 unaccepted root residuals and Class remains 18 unaccepted root residuals; both are classified as source/layout or browser-root measurement residuals, not stale root-pin rows.

goal: Classify the smaller ER, Sankey, Timeline, and Journey residuals and close source-derived rows when cheap and defensible.
handoff: DONE. ER and Sankey are root-green after refreshing existing fixture-derived root pins to Mermaid 11.15 upstream values. Timeline was reduced from 7 to 3 by refreshing 4 existing root pins; remaining Timeline rows are unpinned 0.5-1px width tails. Journey remains 2 unpinned width tails and has no root pin table.

goal: Repair the Sequence SVG text-measurement policy path, or explicitly document the residual if browser-derived calculateTextDimensions behavior cannot be approximated without harming broader headless parity.
handoff: DONE_WITH_CONCERNS. Sequence SVG override generation now follows the Mermaid CLI/Puppeteer browser path, skips wrap-sensitive fixtures and non-endpoint message seeds, and regenerates 891 auditable SVG text rows. Central RTL root parity is exact and full Sequence structural parity is green. Raw Sequence root mismatches dropped from 168 to 68; 67 remain unaccepted after zed_pr_57644_sequence.

goal: Classify and reduce the remaining Sequence HTML br/wrap/note/participant root tails after the SVG override generator repair.
validation: cargo run -p xtask -- compare-sequence-svgs --filter stress_br_in_messages_notes_011 --check-dom --dom-mode parity-root --dom-decimals 3 --report-root-all
cargo run -p xtask -- compare-sequence-svgs --filter stress_long_participant_labels_br_031 --check-dom --dom-mode parity-root --dom-decimals 3 --report-root-all
cargo run -p xtask -- compare-sequence-svgs --filter html_br_variants_and_wrap --check-dom --dom-mode parity-root --dom-decimals 3 --report-root-all
handoff: DONE_WITH_CONCERNS. Final emitted actor/messageText/noteText evidence is now collected from wrap fixtures, while raw wrap seeds remain filtered. The four largest br/wrap rows are root-exact. Sequence structural parity is green. Raw Sequence root mismatches dropped from 68 to 64, and full all-diagram root policy leaves 63 unaccepted Sequence rows after the accepted zed_pr_57644_sequence residual.

goal: Classify and reduce the remaining Sequence long-note, small line-break width, and actor-type height tails after the M15RV-085 wrap evidence update.
validation: cargo run -p xtask -- compare-sequence-svgs --filter stress_quoted_participants_and_types_023 --check-dom --dom-mode parity-root --dom-decimals 3 --report-root-all --no-root-overrides
handoff: DONE_WITH_CONCERNS. Mermaid source-derived actor-type geometry now covers database, boundary, control, and entity participants. Created actor top placement follows the pre-render lifecycle height anchor, root bounds include the footer-row max-height cursor bump, and 6 stale Sequence root pins were deleted after no-root checks proved computed roots exact. Raw Sequence root mismatches dropped from 64 to 28; full all-diagram root policy leaves 27 unaccepted Sequence rows after zed_pr_57644_sequence.

goal: Classify and reduce the remaining Architecture root residual bucket with source-derived group/port/disconnected-component root-bound rules where justified.
handoff: PENDING. Start from target/compare/architecture_report_parity_root.md; current full root evidence reports 30 unaccepted Architecture rows, led by disconnected components, mixed-service forms, and grouped port/root-bound cases.

goal: Close the root residual lane by either making parity-root green or accepting only documented diagnostic residuals with fresh evidence.
handoff: Blocked by source-rule and measurement-policy follow-ups; do not close by accepting the current 135 residuals.
